$ regularizes the interaction at small separations. The coupling to the external perturber is modeled by a cubic decay in radial distance, \begin{equation} K_{J,i} = \kappa_J\, \frac{1}{\big(|r_i-r_J|+\varepsilon\big)^3}, \label{eq:jupiter_coupling} \end{equation} with $
